description: An Access Request Form has been placed on your desktop at ~/Desktop/access_request_form.txt. The Information Security team requires three new named user accounts to be provisioned in ManageEngine OpManager with specific roles, per the organization's access control policy. Review the document, then log in to OpManager at http://localhost:8060 (credentials: admin / Admin@123) and create all three user accounts in the User Manager. Ensure that usernames, full names, email addresses, passwords, and assigned roles match the request exactly.
